victim.value: Daniel Grind-Hall, football team captain who went on a date with Amy and was presumably killed by her
victim.quote: The best part of that date was the dessert, of course Daniel won't think so but others do.

culprit_and_motive.value: Amy, a vampire who killed Daniel to feed on his blood during their date
culprit_and_motive.quote: Finally I'm home. That date was horrible. Well some of it anyway.

resolution.value: Amy is executed by police using holy water and fire after attacking a police officer
resolution.quote: they poured holy water onto me, which will take 10 minutes for me to die in pain

red_herring.value: The supernatural vampire transformation serves as misdirection from any underlying crime or mystery structure
red_herring.quote: I'm not normal I don't know who I am anymore, or what I am.

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with clear divisions between popular athletes and academic outcasts
social_world.quote: I'm in the science team, he's in the football team, I'm a geek, he's a hunk, I'm a loner, he's popular.

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical transformation and supernatural abilities demonstrate the protagonist's vampire nature
reveal_mechanic.quote: my eyes turned yellow, my teeth stuck out and I broke out of my white jumpsuit

media_and_audience.value: Police and authority figures frame the protagonist as a dangerous criminal rather than supernatural being
media_and_audience.quote: The police man kept making snide comments about me I got so angry I hissed at him
